title: Update default WhatsApp reminder message to Marathi with paragraph breaks

requirements.text:
Update the default WhatsApp outstanding-balance reminder message template so it uses the user-provided Marathi text with paragraph breaks and runtime placeholders for Customer Name and Outstanding Balance.

The default message must render as four paragraphs separated by blank lines:
1) "नमस्कार"
2) "<Customer Name>"
3) "आपली खाते बाकी लवकरात लवकर जमा करून सहकार्य करावे."
4) "<Outstanding Balance>" (formatted as INR using the existing en-IN currency formatting)

quotes: set whatsapp massage  नमस्कार  (paragraph)(Customer Name) (paragraph)आपली खाते बाकी लवकरात लवकर जमा करून सहकार्य करावे. (paragraph) (Outstanding Balance)

acceptanceCriteria: When opening the "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" flow for a customer, the edit dialog’s default message contains the Marathi text split into four paragraphs separated by blank lines.
The second paragraph shows the selected customer’s name.
The last paragraph shows the selected customer’s outstanding balance formatted in INR using the existing currency formatting.
Sending the message generates a WhatsApp deep link that preserves the paragraph breaks in the prefilled text.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (shadcn components are read-only).
Keep WhatsApp link generation based on the existing wa.me URL pattern.
nonGoals: Changing backend storage or introducing new persisted per-user WhatsApp templates.
Adding new WhatsApp providers or integrations beyond the current deep-link approach.
